description: Allows the app to read and write assignments and their grades on behalf of the user.

name: IndustryData-SourceSystem.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Manage source system definitions
description: Allows the app to read and write source system definitions on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForTeam
displayName: Read resource specific permissions granted on a team
description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on the team, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: BitlockerKey.Read.All
displayName: Read BitLocker keys
description: Allows the app to read BitLocker keys on behalf of the signed-in user, for their owned devices. Allows read of the recovery key.

name: Policy.ReadWrite.FeatureRollout
displayName: Read and write your organization's feature rollout policies
description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's feature rollout policies on behalf of the signed-in user. Includes abilities to assign and remove users and groups to rollout of a specific feature.

name: Mail.ReadWrite
displayName: Read and write access to user mail
description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete email in user mailboxes. Does not include permission to send mail.

name: LearningSelfInitiatedCourse.Read
displayName: Read user's self-initiated courses
description: Allows the app to read data for the learner's self-initiated courses in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Notifications.ReadWrite.CreatedByApp
displayName: Deliver and manage user notifications for this app
description: Allows the app to deliver its notifications on behalf of signed-in users. Also allows the app to read, update, and delete the user's notification items for this app.

name: Policy.Read.All
displayName: Read your organization's policies
description: Allows the app to read your organization's policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Analytics.Read
displayName: Read user activity statistics
description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's activity statistics, such as how much time the user has spent on emails, in meetings, or in chat sessions.

name: CustomDetection.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write custom detection rules
description: Allows the app to read and write custom detection rules on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForChat.All
displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage only its own tabs for all chats
description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall its own tabs for any chat, without a signed-in user.

name: BusinessScenarioData.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
displayName: Read and write all data for business scenarios this app creates or owns
description: Allows the app to fully manage all data associated with the business scenarios it owns. Data access and changes will be attributed to the signed-in user.

name: Directory.Read.All
displayName: Read directory data
description: Allows the app to read data in your organization's directory, such as users, groups and apps.

name: Device.Read
displayName: Read user devices
description: Allows the app to read a user's list of devices on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: MailboxFolder.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write all the users' mailbox folders
description: Allows the app to read and write all the users' mailbox folders, without signed-in user.

name: AuditLogsQuery-Endpoint.Read.All
displayName: Read audit logs data from Endpoint Data Loss Prevention workload
description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Endpoint Data Loss Prevention workload, on behalf of a signed-in user.

name: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteSelfForChat
displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage itself in chats
description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall itself in chats the signed-in user can access.

name: Chat.ManageDeletion.All
displayName: Delete and recover deleted chats
description: Allows the app to delete and recover deleted chats, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.Read.All
displayName: Read all users' passkey authentication methods
description: Allows the app to read passkey authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

name: People.Read.All
displayName: Read all users' relevant people lists
description: Allows the app to read a scored list of relevant people of the signed-in user or other users in the signed-in user's organization. The list can include local contacts, contacts from social networking, your organization's directory, and people from recent communications (such as email and Skype).

name: CustomTags.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write custom tags data
description: Read and write custom tags data on behalf of the signed-in user

name: IdentityRiskyUser.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write risky user information
description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky user information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky users.

name: ReportSettings.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write admin report settings
description: Allows the app to read and update admin report settings, such as whether to display concealed information in reports, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: ServiceActivity-Teams.Read.All
displayName: Read all Teams service activity
description: Allows the app to read all Teams service activity, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Chat.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write all chat messages
description: Allows an app to read and write all chat messages in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForUser.All
displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps for all user accounts
description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any user account, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific users' data.

name: LearningProvider.ReadWrite
displayName: Manage learning provider
description: Allows the app to create, update, read, and delete data for the learning provider in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: EventListener.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write all identity authentication event listeners
description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's authentication listeners, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser
displayName: Manage user's installed Teams apps
description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps installed for the signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

name: ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForUser
displayName: Read resource specific permissions granted on a user account
description: Allows the app to read the resource specific permissions granted on a user account, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: PrivilegedEligibilitySchedule.ReadWrite.AzureADGroup
displayName: Read, create, and delete eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups
description: Allows the app to read, create, and delete time-based eligibility schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: IdentityRiskEvent.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write risk event information
description: Allows the app to read and update identity risk event information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include confirming risk event detections.

name: SubjectRightsRequest.Read.All
displayName: Read subject rights requests
description: Allows the app to read subject rights requests on behalf of the signed-in user

name: ApprovalSolution.ReadWrite
displayName: Create and cancel user's approval items. Read user's approval items, requests, responses
description: Allows the app to create approvals on behalf of the signed-in user, cancel approvals created by the user and read any of the user's approvals (created by the user or assigned to the user).

name: Policy.ReadWrite.AuthenticationMethod
displayName: Read and write authentication method policies
description: Allows the app to read and write the authentication method policies, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: User.Read.All
displayName: Read all users' full profiles and company properties
description: Allows the app to read the full set of user properties of all users in the organization and read company properties, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: BackupRestore-Configuration.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and edit backup configuration policies
description: Allows the app to read and update the backup configuration, and list of Microsoft 365 service resources to be backed up, on behalf of the signed in user.

name: IndustryData-SourceSystem.Read.All
displayName: View source system definitions
description: Allows the app to read source system definitions on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: UnifiedGroupMember.Read.AsGuest
displayName: Read unified group memberships as guest
description: Allows the app to read basic unified group properties, memberships and owners of the group the signed-in guest is a member of.

name: RoleManagementAlert.Read.Directory
displayName: Read all alert data for your company's directory
description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) alerts for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes reading alert statuses, alert definitions, alert configurations and incidents that lead to an alert.

name: AttackSimulation.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read, create, and update attack simulation data of an organization
description: Allows the app to read, create, and update attack simulation and training data for an organization for the signed-in user.

name: Printer.Read.All
displayName: Read printers
description: Allows the application to read printers on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: ApprovalSolutionResponse.ReadWrite
displayName: Respond to a user's approval. Read user's approval items, requests, responses
description: Allows the app to create approvals on behalf of the signed-in user, cancel approvals created by the user and read any of the user's approvals (created by the user or assigned to the user).

name: BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
displayName: Read and write business scenario configurations this app creates or owns
description: Allows the app to create new business scenarios and fully manage the configurations of scenarios it owns, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Policy.ReadWrite.TrustFramework
displayName: Read and write your organization's trust framework policies
description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's trust framework policies on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: MailboxFolder.Read.All
displayName: Read all the users' mailbox folders
description: Allows the app to read all the users' mailbox folders, without signed-in user.

name: PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureResources
displayName: Read and write privileged access to Azure resources
description: Allows the app to request and manage time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation of user privileges to manage Azure resources (like subscriptions, resource groups, storage, compute) on behalf of the signed-in users.

name: SecurityIdentitiesUserActions.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and perform identity security available user actions
description: Allows the app to read and write identity security available user actions on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Remove.AzureADGroup
displayName: Delete assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups
description: Allows the app to delete time-based assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: CallEvents.Read.All
displayName: Read all call events
description: Allows the app to read call event information for all users in your organization without a signed-in user.

name: MailboxItem.Read
displayName: Read a user's mailbox items
description: Allows the app to read the user's mailbox items, on behalf of the the signed-in user.

name: CopilotSettings-LimitedMode.ReadWrite
displayName: Read and write organization-wide copilot limited mode setting
description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide copilot limited mode setting on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: PrivilegedAccess.ReadWrite.AzureAD
displayName: Read and write privileged access to Azure AD
description: Allows the app to request and manage just in time elevation (including scheduled elevation) of users to Azure AD built-in administrative roles, on behalf of signed-in users.

name: PrivilegedAssignmentSchedule.Read.AzureADGroup
displayName: Read assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups
description: Allows the app to read time-based assignment schedules for access to Azure AD groups, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Calendars.ReadBasic
displayName: Read basic details of user calendars
description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars, except for properties such as body, attachments, and extensions.

name: SecurityAlert.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write to all security alerts
description: Allows the app to read and write to all security alerts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: TeamworkTag.Read.All
displayName: Read tags in Teams
description: Allows the app to read tags in Teams without a signed-in user.

name: AuditLogsQuery-Exchange.Read.All
displayName: Read audit logs data from Exchange workload
description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Exchange workload, on behalf of a signed-in user.

name: TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForChat
displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage only its own tabs in chats
description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall its own tabs in chats the signed-in user can access.

name: TermStore.Read.All
displayName: Read term store data
description: Allows the app to read the term store data that the signed-in user has access to. This includes all sets, groups and terms in the term store.

name: VirtualEvent.Read
displayName: Read your virtual events
description: Allows the app to read virtual events created by the you

name: ExternalItem.ReadWrite.OwnedBy
displayName: Read and write external items
description: Allows the app to read and write external items on behalf of a signed-in user. The signed-in user must be an administrator. The app can only read external items of the connection that it is authorized to.

name: Files.Read.All
displayName: Read all files that user can access
description: Allows the app to read all files the signed-in user can access.

name: CustomAuthenticationExtension.ReadWrite.All
displayName: Read and write all identity custom authentication extensions
description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's custom authentication extnesions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Policy.Read.PermissionGrant
displayName: Read consent and permission grant policies
description: Allows the app to read policies related to consent and permission grants for applications, on behalf of the signed-in user.

name: Lists.SelectedOperations.Selected
displayName: Access selected Lists, on behalf of the signed-in user
description: Allow the application to access a subset of lists on behalf of the signed in user.  The specific lists and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online.
